creator: bensilbernagel@gmail.com
text:
Hi,

This is my first time trying to install FreeBSD. The install went great. The problem occurs when I try to install any package I get an error message saying 'no address record'.

Below is the output for uname:

> FreeBSD bus 12.0-RELEASE FreeBSD 12.0-RELEASE r341666 GENERIC amd64
